response.original_title: Llegada de Herbert Hoover a Lima, Perú
response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s documenting the visit of Herbert Hoover, the renowned statesman and president of UNRRA, who arrived at Limatambo Airport and was greeted by ministers, ambassadors, and members of the political and social elite. His visit to Lima aimed to raise funds for nations devastated by World War II.
response.title: Llegada de Herbert Hoover a Lima, Perú
